message:
bd-3bxhj.5.4: Add Popover widget for anchored floating content

New widget: Popover - lightweight floating panel positioned relative to
an anchor Rect with auto-flip placement when space is constrained.

Features:
- 6 placement options (Above/Below/Left/Right + centered variants)
- Auto-flip: switches direction when insufficient space in preferred direction
- Viewport clamping: content stays within terminal bounds
- Gap/border support: configurable spacing and optional box border
- render_with() callback for custom content rendering

Provides a concrete migration target for React portals, tooltips, and
dropdown menus. Complements existing Modal system (which uses full-screen
backdrop) with a lighter-weight alternative.

18 tests covering placement, flip logic, viewport clamping, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
